issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for W&B usage.

scenarios.name: Bayesian hyperparameter sweep over learning rate and batch size
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses skill's exact distribution syntax (log_uniform_values) and namespaced metric (val/accuracy); baseline uses plain min/max without distribution key.

scenarios.name: Dataset versioning with Artifacts and downstream training run
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly distinguishes runs via job_type (data-prep/training) per the skill pattern; baseline omits job_type entirely.
